privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introText: This Privacy Policy ("Policy") describes how {company} ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, discloses, and otherwise processes your personal data when you access or use our services. This Policy applies to all personal data processed in connection with our websites, applications, and related services (collectively, the "Service").
privacy.introCommitment: We are committed to protecting your personal data in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (EU) 2016/679 ("GDPR"), the California Consumer Privacy Act as amended by the California Privacy Rights Act ("CCPA/CPRA"), and other applicable data protection legislation.
privacy.dpoContact: Our designated Data Protection Officer (DPO), appointed pursuant to GDPR Art. 37, can be contacted at:
privacy.dpoPrimary: Our primary data protection contact is: **{email}**
privacy.dpoNote: **Note:** If your organisation is required to appoint a Data Protection Officer under GDPR Article 37, update this section with the DPO's contact details.
privacy.infoWeCollectIntro: In accordance with GDPR Art. 13(1)(e) and Art. 14(1)(d), we collect the following categories of personal data:
privacy.noInfoCollected: We do not currently collect personal information through this application.
privacy.thirdPartyIntro: Pursuant to GDPR Art. 13(1)(e), we disclose your personal data to the following categories of recipients and third-party data processors:
privacy.thirdPartyNote: Each third-party service provider processes your data under its own privacy policy and data processing agreement. We require all processors to implement appropriate technical and organisational measures in accordance with GDPR Art. 28.
privacy.legalBasisIntro: Under the General Data Protection Regulation, we process your personal data based on the following legal grounds:
privacy.legitimateInterestsIntro: Where we rely on legitimate interest as a legal basis, we have conducted a balancing test to ensure our interests do not override your fundamental rights and freedoms. Our legitimate interests include:
privacy.aiIntro: This application uses AI-powered features provided by third-party services:
privacy.aiUsage1: User inputs may be sent to AI service providers for processing
privacy.aiUsage2: AI-generated outputs are returned to the user
privacy.aiUsage3: We do not use your data to train AI models
privacy.aiUsage4: AI service providers may retain data according to their own policies
privacy.aiNote: **Note:** Review the AI Disclosure document for detailed information about our AI usage as required by the EU AI Act.
privacy.internationalTransfersIntro: Pursuant to GDPR Art. 13(1)(f), we inform you that your personal data may be transferred to and processed in countries outside the European Economic Area (EEA) that may not provide an equivalent level of data protection. The following services involve such transfers:
privacy.internationalTransfersSafeguards: In accordance with GDPR Chapter V (Arts. 44-49), we ensure that appropriate safeguards are in place for all international transfers, including:
privacy.transferSafeguard1: Transfers to countries with an EU adequacy decision
privacy.transferSafeguard2: Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) approved by the European Commission
privacy.transferSafeguard3: EU-US Data Privacy Framework certification (where applicable)
privacy.transferContact: You may request a copy of the applicable safeguards by contacting us at {email}.
privacy.dataRetentionIntro: In accordance with the data minimisation principle (GDPR Art. 5(1)(e)), we retain your personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, unless a longer retention period is required or permitted by applicable law.
privacy.retentionAccount: Account data retained until you delete your account
privacy.retentionUsage: Usage data retained for up to 26 months
privacy.retentionPayment: Payment data retained as required for tax and legal compliance
privacy.yourRightsIntro: Under applicable data protection legislation, you may exercise the following rights with respect to your personal data:
privacy.rightAccess: **Right of Access (Art. 15):** You have the right to obtain confirmation as to whether your personal data is being processed and, where that is the case, to request a copy of the personal data undergoing processing.
privacy.rightRectification: **Right to Rectification (Art. 16):** You have the right to obtain the rectification of inaccurate personal data and, taking into account the purposes of the processing, to have incomplete personal data completed.
privacy.rightErasure: **Right to Erasure (Art. 17):** You have the right to obtain the erasure of your personal data where one of the grounds set out in Art. 17(1) GDPR applies, subject to the exceptions in Art. 17(3).
privacy.rightPortability: **Right to Data Portability (Art. 20):** You have the right to receive your personal data in a structured, commonly used, and machine-readable format, and to transmit that data to another controller without hindrance.
privacy.rightObjection: **Right to Object (Art. 21):** You have the right to object, on grounds relating to your particular situation, to the processing of your personal data based on Art. 6(1)(e) or (f). We shall cease processing unless we demonstrate compelling legitimate grounds.
privacy.rightRestriction: **Right to Restriction of Processing (Art. 18):** You have the right to obtain restriction of processing where one of the conditions set out in Art. 18(1) GDPR applies.
privacy.gdprComplaint: Pursuant to GDPR Art. 77, you have the right to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority, in particular in the Member State of your habitual residence, place of work, or place of the alleged infringement.
privacy.withdrawConsentText: Pursuant to GDPR Art. 7(3), where we process your personal data based on your consent (Art. 6(1)(a) or Art. 9(2)(a)), you have the right to withdraw that consent at any time. The withdrawal of consent shall not affect the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal.
privacy.withdrawConsentMethods: You can withdraw your consent by:
privacy.withdrawMethod1: Adjusting your preferences in your account settings
privacy.withdrawConsentNote: Upon withdrawal, we will cease the relevant processing activities, though some data already collected may be retained where we have another lawful basis for doing so.
privacy.withdrawConsentSimple: Pursuant to GDPR Art. 7(3), where we process your personal data based on your consent, you have the right to withdraw that consent at any time by contacting us at {email}. The withdrawal of consent shall not affect the lawfulness of processing based on consent before its withdrawal.
privacy.automatedNone: Pursuant to GDPR Art. 13(2)(f), we inform you that we do not currently engage in automated decision-making, including profiling, that produces legal effects concerning you or similarly significantly affects you within the meaning of Art. 22(1).
privacy.automatedAIIntro: Pursuant to GDPR Art. 13(2)(f), this application uses automated processing, including AI-powered features, as described in the Artificial Intelligence section above.
privacy.automatedLogic: Meaningful Information About the Logic Involved
privacy.automatedLogicIntro: Our automated processing uses AI models provided by third-party services ({providers}). These models analyse the inputs you provide and generate outputs based on statistical patterns learned during training. The processing involves:
privacy.automatedLogic1: Receiving your input data (text, queries, or other content you submit)
privacy.automatedLogic2: Processing it through the AI model to generate a response or result
privacy.automatedLogic3: Returning the AI-generated output to you
privacy.automatedSignificanceIntro: The use of automated processing may affect you in the following ways:
privacy.automatedSignificance1: AI-generated outputs may influence decisions or actions you take based on them
privacy.automatedSignificance2: The quality and accuracy of outputs depend on the inputs provided and the limitations of the AI model
privacy.automatedSignificance3: Automated processing is not used to make decisions that produce legal effects or similarly significantly affect you without human oversight
privacy.automatedRightsIntro: You have the right not to be subject to decisions based solely on automated processing, including profiling, that produce legal or similarly significant effects concerning you. You may:
privacy.automatedRight1: Request human intervention in any automated decision
privacy.automatedRight2: Express your point of view regarding automated decisions
privacy.automatedRight3: Contest any automated decision that affects you
privacy.automatedRightsContact: To exercise these rights, contact us at {email}.
privacy.dataProvisionText: Pursuant to GDPR Art. 13(2)(e), we inform you whether the provision of personal data is a statutory or contractual requirement, or a requirement necessary to enter into a contract, and the possible consequences of failure to provide such data.
privacy.dataProvisionRequired: **Required data (contractual necessity):** Data necessary for account creation, authentication, and core service functionality. The provision of this data is a requirement necessary to enter into and perform our contract with you. Failure to provide this data will result in our inability to provide you with the Service.
privacy.dataProvisionOptional: **Optional data (consent-based):** Data collected for analytics, personalisation, and service improvement. The provision of this data is voluntary and not a contractual requirement. You may decline to provide this data without any impact on your ability to use the core Service.
privacy.changesToPolicyText: We may revise this Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our data processing practices, applicable law, or regulatory guidance. Where we make material changes, we will notify you by reasonable means, such as a prominent notice on the Service or by email to the address associated with your account, at least thirty (30) days prior to the changes taking effect.
privacy.changesToPolicyCommitment: We will not reduce your rights under this Policy without your explicit consent. Each version of this Policy will be identified by its effective date, and we will maintain an archive of prior versions available upon request.
privacy.changesToPolicyContinued: Your continued use of the Service after the effective date of any revised Policy constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms. If you do not agree with the revised Policy, you must discontinue use of the Service.
privacy.contactIntro: If you have questions about this Policy or wish to exercise your data protection rights, please contact us at:
privacy.footer: This Policy was generated by [Codepliant](https://github.com/codepliant/codepliant) based on automated code analysis. This document is provided as a template and does not constitute legal advice. You should have this Policy reviewed by qualified legal counsel before publication.
tos.title: Terms of Service
tos.agreementText: By accessing or using the services provided by {company} ("the Service"), you agree to be legally bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"), which constitute a binding agreement between you and {company}. IF YOU DO NOT AGREE TO ALL OF THESE TERMS, YOU ARE NOT AUTHORIZED TO ACCESS OR USE THE SERVICE. Your continued use of the Service following any modifications to these Terms constitutes acceptance of such modifications.
tos.descriptionText: {company} is a software application that provides its users with various features and functionalities as described on our website and documentation.
tos.userAccountsIntro: If the Service requires account registration:
tos.account1: You must provide accurate and complete information
tos.account2: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account
tos.account3: You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized access
tos.account4: You are responsible for all activities under your account
tos.account5: You must be at least 16 years old (or the minimum age in your jurisdiction) to create an account
tos.use1: Use the Service for any unlawful purpose
tos.use2: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the Service
tos.use3: Interfere with or disrupt the Service or its infrastructure
tos.use4: Upload malicious code, viruses, or harmful data
tos.use5: Scrape, crawl, or harvest data from the Service without permission
tos.use7: Use the Service to send spam or unsolicited communications
tos.aiContentIntro: The Service uses artificial intelligence to generate content and provide features.
tos.ai1: **No guarantee of accuracy:** AI-generated content may contain errors, inaccuracies, or biases. You are responsible for reviewing and verifying any AI output before relying on it.
tos.ai2: **User inputs:** Content you provide as input to AI features may be processed by third-party AI service providers.
tos.ai3: **Ownership:** You retain ownership of your inputs. AI-generated outputs are provided for your use, but we make no claim of exclusivity — similar outputs may be generated for other users.
tos.ai4: **Prohibited uses:** You may not use AI features to generate content that is illegal, harmful, misleading, or that violates the rights of others.
tos.ai5: **EU AI Act compliance:** We provide transparency about our AI systems as required by applicable regulations. See our AI Disclosure document for details.
tos.payment1: All fees are stated at the time of purchase
tos.payment2: Payments are processed through secure third-party payment providers
tos.payment3: You agree to pay all fees associated with your use of the Service
tos.payment4: Refund policies are as described on our pricing page
tos.payment5: We reserve the right to change pricing with reasonable notice
tos.payment6: All prices are exclusive of taxes unless stated otherwise
tos.content1: You retain ownership of content you upload to the Service
tos.content2: By uploading content, you grant us a limited license to store, process, and display it as necessary to provide the Service
tos.content3: You are responsible for ensuring you have the right to upload any content
tos.content4: We may remove content that violates these Terms
tos.content5: We are not responsible for the loss of user content — maintain your own backups
tos.privacyText: Your use of the Service is also governed by our Privacy Policy. By using the Service, you acknowledge that you have read and understood our Privacy Policy, which describes how we collect, use, and share your personal information.
tos.ipText: The Service, including its code, design, and documentation, is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not copy, modify, distribute, or reverse engineer any part of the Service without our permission.
tos.disclaimerText: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED ON AN "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" BASIS, WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, TITLE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT. {company} DOES NOT WARRANT THAT THE SERVICE WILL BE UNINTERRUPTED, ERROR-FREE, SECURE, OR FREE OF VIRUSES OR OTHER HARMFUL COMPONENTS. YOUR USE OF THE SERVICE IS AT YOUR SOLE RISK. SOME JURISDICTIONS DO NOT ALLOW THE EXCLUSION OF CERTAIN WARRANTIES, SO SOME OF THE ABOVE EXCLUSIONS MAY NOT APPLY TO YOU.
tos.liabilityIntro: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW:
tos.liability1: IN NO EVENT SHALL {company}, ITS AFFILIATES, OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AGENTS, OR LICENSORS BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION LOSS OF PROFITS, DATA, USE, GOODWILL, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES, RESULTING FROM YOUR ACCESS TO OR USE OF (OR INABILITY TO ACCESS OR USE) THE SERVICE
tos.liability2: {company}'S AGGREGATE LIABILITY FOR ALL CLAIMS RELATING TO THE SERVICE SHALL NOT EXCEED THE GREATER OF (A) THE AMOUNTS YOU PAID TO {company} IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM, OR (B) ONE HUNDRED DOLLARS ($100.00 USD)
tos.liability3: THE LIMITATIONS IN THIS SECTION APPLY REGARDLESS OF THE LEGAL THEORY ON WHICH THE CLAIM IS BASED, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION CONTRACT, TORT (INCLUDING NEGLIGENCE), STRICT LIABILITY, OR ANY OTHER BASIS, EVEN IF {company} HAS BEEN ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGES
tos.liability4: SOME JURISDICTIONS DO NOT ALLOW THE LIMITATION OR EXCLUSION OF LIABILITY FOR INCIDENTAL OR CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES, SO THE ABOVE LIMITATIONS MAY NOT APPLY TO YOU. IN SUCH JURISDICTIONS, {company}'S LIABILITY SHALL BE LIMITED TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW
tos.indemnificationText: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless {company}, its officers, directors, employees, and agents from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of or related to: (a) your use of the Service; (b) your violation of these Terms; (c) your violation of any rights of a third party; or (d) any content you submit or transmit through the Service.
tos.disputesText: Any dispute, controversy, or claim arising out of or relating to these Terms, or the breach, termination, or invalidity thereof, shall first be submitted to good-faith negotiation between the parties. If the dispute is not resolved within thirty (30) days of written notice, it shall be finally resolved by binding arbitration administered by the American Arbitration Association ("AAA") under its Commercial Arbitration Rules, or alternatively by JAMS under its Comprehensive Arbitration Rules and Procedures, at the election of the claimant. The arbitration shall be conducted in {jurisdiction} by a single arbitrator. The arbitrator's decision shall be final and binding, and judgment on the award may be entered in any court having jurisdiction thereof. Each party shall bear its own costs and attorney's fees unless the arbitrator determines otherwise.
tos.disputesSmallClaims: Notwithstanding the foregoing, either party may bring an individual action in small claims court for disputes within the jurisdictional limits of such court.
tos.classAction: **CLASS ACTION WAIVER:** YOU AND {company} AGREE THAT EACH PARTY MAY BRING CLAIMS AGAINST THE OTHER ONLY IN YOUR OR ITS INDIVIDUAL CAPACITY, AND NOT AS A PLAINTIFF OR CLASS MEMBER IN ANY PURPORTED CLASS, CONSOLIDATED, OR REPRESENTATIVE PROCEEDING. UNLESS BOTH PARTIES AGREE OTHERWISE IN WRITING, THE ARBITRATOR MAY NOT CONSOLIDATE MORE THAN ONE PERSON'S CLAIMS AND MAY NOT OTHERWISE PRESIDE OVER ANY FORM OF A CLASS, CONSOLIDATED, OR REPRESENTATIVE PROCEEDING. IF THIS SPECIFIC PROVISION IS FOUND TO BE UNENFORCEABLE, THEN THE ENTIRETY OF THIS ARBITRATION SECTION SHALL BE NULL AND VOID. THIS CLASS ACTION WAIVER IS AN ESSENTIAL PART OF THIS ARBITRATION AGREEMENT AND MAY NOT BE SEVERED FROM IT.
tos.termination1: You may stop using the Service at any time
tos.termination2: We may suspend or terminate your access for violation of these Terms
tos.termination3: Upon termination, your right to use the Service ceases immediately
tos.termination4: Provisions that by their nature should survive termination will survive
tos.slaText: We employ commercially reasonable efforts to maintain the availability and performance of the Service, including the use of monitoring and error-tracking systems. However, unless a separate Service Level Agreement ("SLA") has been executed between you and {company}, we do not guarantee any specific level of uptime, availability, or response time.
tos.slaCommitment: If {company} offers a separate SLA for your subscription tier, the terms of that SLA shall govern service availability commitments and any associated remedies, including service credits. In the event of a conflict between this section and a separately executed SLA, the SLA shall prevail.
tos.changesText: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. We will provide notice of material changes by posting the updated Terms on the Service and updating the "Last Modified" date at the top of this document. For material changes that adversely affect your rights, we will provide at least thirty (30) days' advance notice via email or a prominent notice within the Service. Your continued use of the Service after the effective date of the revised Terms constitutes your binding acceptance of such changes.
tos.forceMajeureText: Neither party shall be liable for any failure or delay in performing its obligations under these Terms where such failure or delay results from circumstances beyond its reasonable control, including but not limited to acts of God, natural disasters, war, terrorism, riots, embargoes, acts of government, epidemics, pandemics, power or telecommunications failures, or internet disruptions.
tos.governingLawText: These Terms are governed by the laws of {jurisdiction}. Any disputes not subject to arbitration will be resolved in the courts of {jurisdiction}.
tos.severability: **Severability:** If any provision of these Terms is found to be unenforceable or invalid by a court of competent jurisdiction, the remaining provisions will continue in full force and effect.
tos.entireAgreement: **Entire Agreement:** These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy and any other policies referenced herein, constitute the entire agreement between you and {company} regarding the Service, and supersede all prior agreements and understandings.
tos.assignment: **Assignment:** You may not assign or transfer your rights or obligations under these Terms without our prior written consent. We may assign our rights and obligations without restriction.
tos.contactText: If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us at:
tos.footer: These Terms of Service were generated by [Codepliant](https://github.com/codepliant/codepliant) based on automated code analysis. This document is provided as a template and does not constitute legal advice. You should have these Terms reviewed by qualified legal counsel before publication.
cookie.title: Cookie Policy
cookie.whatAreCookiesText: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They serve various purposes including remembering your preferences, analyzing site usage, and enabling functionality.
cookie.legalBasisText: Under Article 5(3) of the ePrivacy Directive (2002/58/EC), storing or accessing information on a user's device requires prior informed consent, except where the cookie is strictly necessary to provide a service explicitly requested by the user.
cookie.strictlyNecessary: **Strictly necessary cookies:** Exempt from the consent requirement under ePrivacy Directive Art. 5(3) because they are essential for providing the service you have requested. These cookies are placed based on our legitimate interest under GDPR Art. 6(1)(f).
cookie.nonEssential: **All other cookies (analytics, advertising, functional):** Placed only with your prior consent under GDPR Art. 6(1)(a) and ePrivacy Directive Art. 5(3). Non-essential cookies are blocked until you provide consent.
cookie.consentIntro: In accordance with Article 5(3) of the ePrivacy Directive and the GDPR, {company} obtains your consent before placing any non-essential cookies on your device.
cookie.consent1: A cookie consent banner is displayed on your first visit
cookie.consent2: Non-essential cookies are blocked until you provide consent (prior-consent model)
cookie.consent3: You can accept all, reject all, or customise your preferences by cookie category
cookie.consent4: Accept and reject options are presented with equal prominence
cookie.functionalCookies: Functional cookies that are not strictly necessary
cookie.consentRecords: **Consent records:** We log your consent decision, including the date, time, and categories selected, as required by the GDPR's accountability principle (Art. 5(2)).
cookie.withdrawingConsent: **Withdrawing consent:** You can withdraw or change your cookie consent at any time by:
cookie.withdraw1: Clicking the "Cookie Preferences" link in our website footer
cookie.withdraw2: Adjusting your browser settings to block or delete cookies
cookie.withdrawNote: Withdrawal of consent is as easy as giving consent. Upon withdrawal, we will cease using the relevant cookies, though some data already collected may be retained as described in our Privacy Policy.
cookie.howWeUseIntro: We use cookies and similar technologies for the following purposes:
cookie.strictlyNecessaryText: These cookies are essential for the website to function and cannot be switched off. They do not require consent under the ePrivacy Directive because they are necessary to provide a service you have explicitly requested.
cookie.optionalAnalyticsText: These cookies help us understand how visitors interact with our website. They are **not strictly necessary** and are only placed with your prior consent.
cookie.consentRequired: **Consent required:** These cookies are only set after you have given your consent via our cookie consent banner. If you do not consent, these cookies will not be placed and the associated analytics features will not function.
cookie.manage1: **Cookie consent banner:** Use our cookie consent tool to manage your preferences (displayed on first visit and accessible via the "Cookie Preferences" link)
cookie.manage2: **Browser settings:** Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies
cookie.manage3: **Opt-out links:** Visit the following links to opt out of specific services:
cookie.thirdPartyIntro: Some third-party services we use may set their own cookies:
cookie.thirdPartyNote: These third parties have their own cookie and privacy policies.
cookie.gpcText1: We recognize the Global Privacy Control (GPC) signal. When we detect a GPC signal from your browser:
cookie.gpc1: We treat it as a valid opt-out request
cookie.gpc3: Your preference is respected across our service
cookie.gpcLearnMore: To enable GPC, install a supporting browser or extension. Learn more at https://globalprivacycontrol.org
cookie.updatesText: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date.
cookie.contactText: For questions about our use of cookies, please contact:
cookie.footer: This cookie policy was generated by [Codepliant](https://github.com/codepliant/codepliant) based on automated code analysis. Review and customize it for your specific use case.
